summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for Rina Visuals photography website. Tested booking calendar, admin login flow, admin dashboard navigation, and contact form submission.

ui_bugs.issue: Form fields may not be properly preserving user input - form display shows placeholder values instead of typed values

passed_tests: Booking calendar date selection - user can select future dates successfully
Full booking wizard flow (4 steps) - date selection, package selection, event details, payment
Package selection in booking flow works correctly
Form field validation in booking wizard (step 3) works properly
Admin login with credentials admin@rinavisuals.com / admin123 - successful authentication
Admin dashboard loads with all required tabs (Bookings, Portfolio, Packages, Messages, Users)
Admin dashboard tab navigation works correctly
Admin dashboard displays user data and has proper role-based access
action_item_for_main_agent: Contact form input handling needs investigation - form fields may not be properly capturing and displaying user input. The form submission process works but input field state management appears to have issues.
success_percentage: frontend: 90% - Most features working correctly, minor contact form input handling issue
